Re: HM reply — wants intro call this wk. Don't bite same-day; sit on it.
WFH today. Killed office day, declined the two standups.
Push 1:1 w/ mgr to later — keep the afternoon clear.

messages.text: the calibration 'process' is just budget theater with a performance-review costume on. Packet was clean and they still found a way to no. anyway. how's your week
ok who's seen the inside of a real promo committee recently because I have Thoughts and a NDA-shaped hole where the venting should go lol
[voice memo 1:47] hey — quieter week, Anaya finally sleeping past 5. still chewing on the Q1 thing. tell me you have gossip, I need something that isn't a diaper
saw this and immediately thought of you — Series B AI infra, Palo Alto, staff/principal band, fully remote-OK. founder's ex-Stripe infra. want the warm intro or should I sit on it?
real question, not a vent: do the safety labs actually take infra people seriously or is it all RL/eval purists. trying to figure out if 'family-blessed' = 'good fit' or just good optics for Dad
Marcus! way overdue. no agenda — ok, small agenda. free for a catch-up Zoom in the next couple weeks? would value your read on a few things
can you do the Sunday call from your place not the office, parents will be on and I don't want the Priya-at-DeepMind segment in surround sound. 11 my time?

ok modeled the infra role last night. two Qs before I say yes to the intro: is the equity refresh on the new grant or the underwater legacy mess, and how real is remote post-Series-C. don't want another 2023
walk this week? lake, usual. I have updates and I think you do too. not over text

Hey Marcus — good to hear from you. Yeah, let's do the backchannel thing in principle. Not making any sudden moves, but I'm at the point where I'll listen to the right conversation. Appreciate you reaching out without making it weird. Will ping when there's something concrete enough to be worth your time.

[voice memo, 0:47] Okkk don't freak out but we're opening a Principal req and I literally said your name in the room. Like unprompted. The scope is real infra, not babysitting a roadmap. I know you're heads-down with Anaya and everything's on fire but… just let me float it? No pressure no pressure. Call me when the baby sleeps lol

ok you have my attention. who's the hiring manager — is it you or someone above you? and is 'Principal' the actual leveled title or aspirational-title-that-means-Staff. you know me, I'm going to read the equity terms before I read the org chart. tell me more but quietly, I haven't said anything to anyone here.
6pm by the lake still good? same spot. I'll bring coffee, you bring the part of the story you didn't tell me last time. don't reply on anything but this.

I've been sitting with it all day. I'm serious now — not 'maybe someday' serious, actually-open serious. Send the intro when you're ready. I'd rather move through you than walk into anything cold. Just keep it off LinkedIn, I've got eyes I don't trust here.

can't sleep, Anaya finally down. work is… fine. it's fine. (it's not but I don't want to get into it over text.) tell me honestly though — the safety-lab world you keep nudging me toward, what's the culture actually like for someone who'd come in senior? do they take infra people seriously or is it all research-prestige hierarchy. asking for a friend who is me.

Done — forwarded you + Ravi (our HM) on a thread just now. Told him you're the strongest systems person I've worked with and he should clear his calendar. Subject line's deliberately boring so it doesn't scream 'recruiting' in your inbox 😏 ball's in your court, take your time.

Things just got a little more real on my end. Would you be up for taking a reference / backchannel call next week if someone reaches out? Won't be a surprise — I'll tell you who and when first. You've always been straight with me and that's exactly the kind of read I'd want them to get.

Hi Ravi — thanks for the intro, and thanks to Pree for the (overly generous) framing. I'd genuinely enjoy a technical-depth conversation about what you're building on the infra side — less interested in the pitch, more in the actual problems and constraints. Async or a short call works; I tend to think better in writing first. Where would you like to start?
Replied to Ravi. Kept it dry and technical, the way I like it. Thank you — genuinely. I owe you a long rambling voice memo and probably wine the next time you're in Austin. ❤️
Sent. Three drafts, killed the adverbs, landed on something that sounds like me and not a LinkedIn cope. Did the HM write back yet or am I refreshing my inbox like a degenerate?

Hey Marcus — been sitting on your Feb offer longer than I should have. I'm quietly looking. If that backchannel intro is still on the table, I'd take you up on it. Async is my love language these days, so no pressure on a call.

Thanks for the quick turn. Wednesday evening works on my end — say 7:30pm CT? Happy to do video. Fair warning, I think in writing, so I'll likely send a follow-up doc after rather than promise answers live. Looking forward to the technical depth conversation.

[voice memo, 0:34] Okay so the call's in seven hours and I've reread the JD four times. I'm not nervous, I'm... fine. I'm nervous. Talk me off the ledge — is it deranged that the title line item matters to me more than the number? Don't answer that, I know it's the wound talking. Call you after.

It went well. Genuinely well. They opened with Principal and didn't blink — said it 'reflects the scope I've been carrying,' which, you know. Felt it land somewhere I don't talk about. Don't tell Mom and Dad yet. Don't tell anyone yet. But yeah. Yeah.

Hi Carla — Anaya's got a fever this morning, ~100.8, fussy and not eating. Can we hold today? I don't want to expose you and I'd rather keep her home. So sorry for the last-minute. I'll still pay for the day, that's not a question. Will update you on tomorrow tonight.

I can't take the 2pm pediatrician slot, I have the thing today, I told you about the thing. Can you? Before you say standup — your standup is fifteen minutes and reschedulable, my afternoon isn't. I'm not trying to fight, I'm trying to not be the default parent again.

Thank you again for last night — really enjoyed it. Apologies for the brief reply, kid's home sick and I'm running on fumes. Will send the follow-up notes I mentioned once I've surfaced. Still very much engaged on my end.

Update: call was strong, Principal is on the table, I'll spare you the spreadsheet I already built. Also: I'm sorry, I've been a black hole this week. Sick baby + sleep debt + the whole process. Bandwidth is at like 8%. I'm not ghosting, I'm just submerged.

This is the part nobody warns you about. Anaya's been sick two days, Arjun and I are passing the baton like it's a relay we both resent, and somewhere in there I'm supposed to be casually negotiating the most important offer of my career. I keep thinking I'm being mommy-tracked and then realizing I'm doing it to myself. I'm tired, V.

This is great, thank you Marcus. Yes, let's make it happen — who's the right person to loop, and do you want to intro directly or should I send you a couple lines you can forward? Whatever's lowest-friction for you. I owe you one.

Fever broke overnight, she actually ate this morning and demanded the spoon back, so we're trending up. I think she's good for the nanny tomorrow. Truce on yesterday — I was sharp and I know it. Can we sync tonight on who's got what this week? Coffee on me, metaphorically, since neither of us leaves the house.

Sunday call recap: Dad found a way to mention Priya's DeepMind promo inside the first four minutes. Director. London. Twice. Two years ago this would've ruined my afternoon. Today I just thought — fine, watch. If this Principal thing closes, the benchmarking stops being a wound and starts being motivation. Reframing it as fuel. Mostly. 80% fuel.

One ask, and tell me if it's too much: if you've got any informal line to their side, a light nudge on timeline would help. Not pushy — just 'is she still in the picture' energy. I move slow and deliberate by nature, but I don't want to lose this to silence while I'm heads-down with a sick kid. You're the one vector I trust to do it without it looking thirsty.

just surfaced from a focus block, finally listened to your memo. yes to the infra role — the JD actually reads like it was written by someone who's run a real on-call rotation, which is novel. send me the HM's name and I'll do my homework before any call. and thank you, genuinely. you've been the only person treating this like a real search and not a pep talk.

can't sleep, Anaya finally down. been spiraling a little. the more I sit with Q1 the more I think you're right that the answer isn't 'win the next cycle here' — it's leave. you keep nudging me toward the safety labs and I keep flinching, but honestly the flinch is fear not disinterest. don't tell mom/dad anything yet. I'm not ready for the Priya-comparison Sunday call.

Marcus — taking you up on that February offer. I'm quietly looking. Senior Staff now, but I'm targeting Principal-level — I've been operating at it for two years and I want the title to say so. If a backchannel comes your way, you have my blessing to be candid about the work. Keeping this very contained though; my current shop can't get a whiff. Thank you for asking how I was *actually* doing back then. I wasn't ready to answer until now.

Thanks for the quick turnaround — the conversation was exactly the technical-depth discussion I was hoping for. I'm available for the next round Thu or Fri afternoon CT, async-friendly if you'd rather do a written design exercise first (I prefer it). One ask: please keep the loop tight on the timeline; my situation is time-sensitive and discretion matters on my end.

voice memo: hey — round went well, I think. could you do me one favor and gently poke your HM on timeline? not pushy, just signal that I'm a real candidate not a tire-kicker. I'm trying not to look thirsty but the longer this drags the more exposed I feel where I am now. you have better read on their pace than I do. ily, talk soon.

gut-check: be brutal. if I went to a safety lab and it paid in equity-heavy + make-whole, am I chasing the mission or just running from the ego wound of getting passed over? because I can't always tell which one's driving. you're the only person who'd actually call me on it. (also: would it even register to dad as a 'real' company or is it another 'not-FAANG' shrug)

morning degenerates. low-key putting feelers out — if any of you are at places hiring staff/principal ML infra and the eng culture isn't a dumpster fire, DM me privately, not here. austin-remote, not relocating. keeping it off the record so pls don't broadcast. miss you all, the group chat is the only Bay I have left.
how's your timeline looking these days? no agenda, just checking in. things on my side are... moving. wanted to gauge where your head's at without making it weird. (timer's on, as always)

late one again. the anxiety's loud tonight — mortgage at 6.8, the RSUs are basically Monopoly money, nanny's 2.6 a month, and I'm about to gamble the one stable thing I have. Arjun's equity is just as underwater so there's no soft landing if this goes sideways. tell me I'm not being reckless. or tell me I am, I trust you to.

weekend recap memo: survived. did the nudge land? any read on whether they're moving to an offer? I built the comp model already — if they structure it as a front-loaded make-whole it actually works for us, even with the cash crunch. trying to stay patient. thank you for carrying this with me, P. couldn't do the search alone and you've made it feel less lonely.

ok so — update. The thing actually moved. They came back positive, and I mean genuinely positive, not recruiter-positive. I'm trying not to spiral about it but I keep refreshing my own thread like an idiot. Anyway. You know that firm better than I do — what's your honest read? Like is the eng org real or is it a slide deck with a GPU budget. Don't be diplomatic, I can take it. Call you after Anaya's down.

not pushing, just curious where your head's at on timing. you said 6ish months — still feel like that? no reason. mostly just doing the math on a couple things and your answer changes one of them. you don't have to spell it out here.

need you to be the tiebreaker again. there's a real offer forming and it's above current level on paper. but I can't tell if I want it because it's actually the right move or because it lets me say "see, I WAS operating at that level." like is this Principal-real or politics-real, and does it even matter which. don't tell mom/dad. don't tell Arjun yet either, I haven't fully — anyway. call when you're free.
